attacking_style: Launches calculated, sacrificial solo attacks in the 15-20km range designed to force opponents to expend resources rather than seeking personal victory.
team_tactics: Deploys as a tactical disruptor who attacks to drain specific rival teams' domestiques, protecting team leaders or sprint trains through strategic energy expenditure by opponents.
terrain_preference: Insufficient data to determine specific terrain preferences; attacks observed in transition phases where forcing chase work maximizes tactical damage.
vulnerability: Single observation limits vulnerability assessment; role as domestique means personal results secondary to team tactics.
key_patterns: Executes planned solo attacks 18-20km from finish with strategic rather than winning intent.
Forces targeted teams to commit domestiques to chase work, depleting their resources.
Accepts recapture as mission success when opponent energy expenditure achieved.
form_trajectory: unknown: single race observation insufficient to assess trajectory or development patterns
